description: Fetch the daily trending products leaderboard from Product Hunt. Defaults to today, automatically falling back to yesterday if today's leaderboard has not yet been published (common in non-PT timezones). Supports historical dates via --date. Returns ranked products with title, tagline, vote count, topic tags, slug, and product URL. No authentication required.

parameters.name: date
parameters.description: Leaderboard date in YYYY-MM-DD format. Defaults to today with automatic fallback to yesterday if the leaderboard is not yet published.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of products to return.
